overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt running through a stormy night landscape. The character travels along a dirt path from open grassland past a wooden gallows, transitioning into a dense forest alongside a body of water under dark, turbulent skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail approaching execution site

events.description: character draws steel sword while running, then sheathes it shortly after
approaching wooden gallows structure with hanging body visible ahead on the right

agents.ego_description: running steadily along dirt path through open grassland, briefly drawing weapon

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through tall grass
tall wooden post and crossbeam with rope noose
sparse pine and deciduous trees dotting the landscape
dark turbulent cloud cover with patches of lighter sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark stormy night in open grassland. Geralt runs along a dirt path, briefly drawing his sword, while approaching a wooden gallows structure with a hanging body visible ahead. The landscape is sparse with scattered trees and dark storm clouds filling the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from grassland to forest edge

events.description: passing the wooden gallows with hanging body now on the left side of the path
stone building becomes visible through trees on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along path, passing the gallows and heading toward denser woodland

entered.detail: small stone structure or tower visible through tree line
thicker forest approaching in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having passed the gallows, the character continues running through transitional grassland with increasing tree density. A stone building appears through the trees on the left as the path leads toward a darker forest ahead. The stormy sky remains visible overhead.

events.description: path curves left revealing lake or river water visible through trees on the left
entering denser forest canopy with significantly darker lighting

agents.ego_description: running along forest path with water visible to the left, entering darker woodland

entered.detail: calm body of water visible through the trees along the left side of the path
large boulders and rocky terrain on the right side of the trail
dense overhead tree cover creating a tunnel-like effect

segments.scene_description: The trail curves left alongside a body of water, entering a dense forest with rocky outcrops on the right. The stone building is lost from view behind the trees as the canopy thickens overhead, creating a darker, more enclosed atmosphere. The character continues running through the stormy woodland toward the distant tree line.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy night landscape that transitions from open, desolate grasslands into a dense, enclosed forest. It begins with Geralt running along a dirt path under dark storm clouds, briefly drawing his sword as he approaches a wooden gallows with a hanging body. As he passes the structure, the terrain shifts into transitional grassland where the tree density increases and a stone building emerges through the foliage on the left. The scene then curves left alongside a body of water, moving away from the building and deeper into a thick woodland characterized by rocky outcrops. Finally, the canopy closes overhead, shifting the atmosphere from an open plain to a dark, oppressive forest as the character continues his run toward the distant tree line.
